chapter_title.en: Chapter on Bequests for an Heir

text: 5443 - قَالَ مُصَنِّفُ هَذَا اَلْكِتَابِ رَحِمَهُ اَللَّهُ اَلْخَبَرُ اَلَّذِي رُوِيَ : "أَنَّهُ لاَ وَصِيَّةَ لِوَارِثٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5443 - The author of this book (may Allah (swt) have mercy on him) said that another narration states "There is no will for an heir".
